author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
## Findings

Five items in the original scope:

1. Quickstart over-specifies `--colocate`. **Done** — `jj git
   init` defaults to colocated on jj 0.40+; flag dropped from
   the quickstart with a parenthetical for older jj users.
2. Memories don't auto-decay. **Done** — added a paragraph to
   CLAUDE.md's memory section about pruning when invariants
   shift, and added a `jjf forget` example to step 6 of the
   quickstart.
3. Multi-machine setup recipe (gated on F-001). **Done** —
   added a new step 8 "Joining an existing project" to the
   quickstart, covering clone → init → pull → ls. F-001 was
   fixed in `d4be791e`; the recipe relies on `jjf init`
   writing the fetch refspec and `jjf pull` fetching the data.
4. Prefix-id contract (gated on F-008). **N/A** — F-008 was
   reverted (`c8e0d896`); CLAUDE.md was updated as part of
   that commit. Nothing left to do here.
5. `jjf dep ls` wishlist note. **Done** — replaced the
   obsolete `dep add|rm` wishlist entry (those landed in
   `b6d066b`) with a `dep ls` ask, flagging F-009's
   cycle-detection context.

Bonus updates: the CLAUDE.md "Project shape today" verb list
was stale; refreshed to include `ready`, `block`/`unblock`,
`abandon`, `dep`, and the memory verbs. Dropped the stale
"178 workspace tests" count per the project rule against test
counts in commits/PR messages.

Verified the new quickstart end-to-end against a throwaway
repo in `scratchpad/qa/qs-verify/`; transcript reproduces.

## Recommendation

Close as done. The five planned items landed, plus the verb-
list refresh.

## Confidence

HIGH — every change manually re-verified.

## Open follow-ups

None for this ticket. The wishlist's `dep ls` entry is a
follow-up to file as its own ticket if someone wants to ship
the diagnostic.
